title: Deconstruct Dependency Graph Analysis
description: Deconstruct how bundlers like Vite and Webpack construct the module dependency graph. Analyze the impact of circular dependencies on tree-shaking efficiency and bundle size. Trace the module resolution process within modern JavaScript bundlers.
objectives: Deconstruct how bundlers like Vite and Webpack construct the module dependency graph.
Analyze the impact of circular dependencies on tree-shaking efficiency and bundle size.
Trace the module resolution process within modern JavaScript bundlers.
